//: memattest Claude Code integration template. Replace <MEMORY_DIR> with your guarded memory directory. SessionStart verifies (exit 1 = tamper report shown to user+agent); PostToolUse appends after memory writes; the deny rule keeps the agent from blessing its own tampering (spec 8). The deny rule is defense-in-depth; the primary control is the interactive-TTY requirement built into 'memattest adopt' itself.
